title: Genius AI Detector
abstract: Tired of struggling with your writing? Fear not, the [Genius AI Detector] is here to help! Think of it as a mysterious "AI detective" that can spot whether your text was penned by a machine. Your creations are no longer secrets but small challenges—can it uncover the clues? Give it a try and let this tool lend you a hand!
abstract_zh: 你还在为写文章烦恼吗？别怕，【Genius AI Detector】来帮你！它就像一个神秘的“AI侦探”，能一眼识破你的文字是否出自人工智能之手。从此，你的创作不再是秘密，而是一个个小挑战，看看它能否找出蛛丝马迹！快来试试吧，让这个工具助你一臂之力！
